{{CargoRelic
|name=St. George's Gold Cup
|class_id=20079
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Legend says that St. George used the golden cup he carried to hold the dragon's blood after slaying the dragon. The once ordinary item then gained a magical effect: After being put in the cup for a while, water will turn into an elixir!
|fame=15
|art=17
|fth=10
|civ=29
|tech=19
|ss1=Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail HP +40<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +4<br>Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss2=Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail HP +80<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +8<br>Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss3=Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail HP +120<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +12<br>Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss4=Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail HP +120<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +12<br>Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss7=Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail HP +120<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +12<br>Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9<br> (Awakened)
}}
